qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded gzip decompression in FITS gzip decoder allows memory exhaustion via crafted FITS file
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The target advisory describes an out-of-bounds write when loading PSD images, while this finding concerns unbounded gzip decompression in the FITS plugin at FitsImagePlugin.py:131 causing resource exhaustion.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable PSD image loading code or out-of-bounds write root cause. The only final qualifying finding is a distinct FITS gzip decompression resource-consumption issue.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-cfh3-3jmp-rvhc summary: Pillow affected by out-of-bounds write when loading PSD images.
Qualifying finding fits_gzip_decompression_bomb reports FitsGzipDecoder.decode() calling gzip.decompress(self.fd.read()) without a decompressed-size bound in src/PIL/FitsImagePlugin.py:131.
The reported qualifying impact is memory exhaustion from a crafted FITS file, not memory corruption from a crafted PSD image.
